snippets: Plaettenfahrten are traditional flat-bottomed boat tours in Amberg.
Plaettenfahrten take place on the Vils river.
Plaettenfahrten pass through the old town of Amberg.
The boats used in Plaettenfahrten are flat-bottomed.
Flat-bottomed boats were historically called Platten.
Plaettenfahrten are based on a historical transport tradition.
Flat-bottomed boats were used to transport iron ore.
Iron ore was transported downstream using these boats.
Plaettenfahrten are a unique traditional experience in Amberg.
Plaettenfahrten are offered for groups.
Plaettenfahrten must be booked in advance.
Plaettenfahrten can be booked through the Tourist Information.
